title: lonchocarpus scandens
intro: Lonchocarpus scandens, also known as the climbing bean tree or buffalo bean, is a tropical plant species native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Lonchocarpus scandens include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and expectorant. Herbal preparations of Lonchocarpus scandens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying and processing the plant's leaves, bark, or seeds.
